title: connection_is_typing flag at relay: correct locus for phantom-typing fix
description: The typing phantom on disconnect is fixed at the relay layer (connection_is_typing in ws.rs), not in Dart clients. This is the correct locus: the relay knows all connected peers and is authoritative about who just disconnected. A client-side fix would require each peer to independently time out typing indicators, which they already do (4s timer in _setTyping), but that still leaves a 4-second window. The relay-side synthesis makes it instant and requires no protocol extension. A contributor might suggest moving this to client-side logic only — that is worse because the relay synthesizes on any disconnect including crash/network cut, whereas client timers only fire if the client stays running.
close_reason: Design decision recorded for future reference. No code action required.
